artPrompt: A towering sentient casserole risen to godhood on its warming tray, stacked layers of noodle and cheese ascending the wide frame into golden divine light, faint bureaucratic limbs of steam reaching for the floor. Its halo bleeds ivory and green, the warming tray glinting at the base, all rising gesture and reverent absurdity. A food deity holding court, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Casserole That Achieved Quorum
type: Legendary Acorn Artifact Creature — Food Deity Bureaucrat
text:
it has been on the warming tray so long it gained sentience and then gained standing and then gained the floor.
The Casserole That Achieved Quorum has power and toughness each equal to the number of dishes, real and imagined, present and remembered, at every potluck that has ever been. (this number is warm.)
{T}, take a bite: it forgives you. it also recalls the frontrunner, because it remembers everything, especially who didn't bring a dish.
flavorText: layer one: noodles. layer two: cheese. layer seven: the minutes of every meeting. layer ∞: us.
